response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong polyglot background, but the resume shows minimal recent Java/Kotlin work and no evidence of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or IDE/language-tooling experience. Their JVM exposure is limited to brief mentions of Java alongside DLang at Altom (2016-2018) and a short C/C++ stint at NI working on a C IDE — not Java/Kotlin tooling. The closest relevant signal is the NI LabWindows/CVI IDE work, but it's a decade old and in C, not JVM. Core stack is JS/TS, Node, and DLang.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing focus
Past IDE-adjacent work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Broad systems experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded
concerns: Java/Kotlin not a primary skill; Kotlin not mentioned at all
No recent language tooling or IDE internals work
